== Notes for [[Item:Q99628|Q99628]] ==

He was previously designated as levi, but see discussion:- https://www.geni.com/discussions/215660 For him to be a descendant of a Bostnai, he is neither kohen nor Levi.

The profiles ought to be checked against the sources to ensure that he really is a son here.

----

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD7B9AD41EFBBFA9822EF79916CC7BB
geni:6000000000961705515

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
